caption: The video captures a serene and empty stadium, likely before or after a match. The camera is positioned inside a dimly lit dugout area, looking out onto the field through an opening framed by red seats. The vast expanse of the green pitch stretches out under a partly cloudy sky, with bright stadium lights illuminating the scene. The stands are completely vacant, emphasizing the quiet and stillness of the moment. A few scattered objects, possibly equipment or bags, lie on the field, adding to the sense of anticipation or aftermath. The overall atmosphere is peaceful, with the focus on the grandeur and emptiness of the stadium.
